QUICK LINKS Grievance Redressal Committee Anti Ragging Committee Student Welfare Counsellor Committee Anti Ragging Committee SC/ST Cell Contact STUDY IN INDIA X TNEACODE 2739 Campus tour Admission 2025 TNEACODE 2739 RESEARCH INSTITUTE 147 PhD Holders 50+ AU Research Supervisors 121+ AU Research Scholars 1Cr+ Research Incentives RESEARCH INSTITUTE Sri Eshwar has been recognized as Research Institute by Anna University

. Research Institute status further strengthens our commitment to research among faculty and student community and helps us play a significant role in mentoring and guiding more academicians to complete their PhD programs and join the research fraternity. As a Research Institute, we can accelerate our research undertakings and hence contribute to world-class research . RESEARCH FACILITIES Sri Eshwar is committed to investing in high quality research facilities that enhance the quality of research and bring out the best research outcomes.
